mapper.insert: INSERT INTO todo_attachments (todo_id, original_filename, stored_filename, content_type, size, created_at) VALUES (#{todoId}, #{originalFilename}, #{storedFilename}, #{contentType}, #{size}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, todo_id, original_filename, stored_filename, content_type, size, created_at FROM todo_attachments WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, todo_id, original_filename, stored_filename, content_type, size, created_at FROM todo_attachments WHERE todo_id = #{todoId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
